name: my-earned-wings
description: Ein atmosphärisches Spiel über das Finden der eigenen Flügel - Golden Master Core 3.5.
author: Lassandriel

scripts.dev: npm run build:content && npm run build-electron && concurrently "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development .\node_modules\.bin\electron.cmd dist_electron/main.js"
scripts.build-exe: npm run clean && powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force dist_electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path dist_electron" && npm run build && npm run build-electron && powershell -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path dist_electron/public/img -Force; Copy-Item public/img/Game_icon.ico dist_electron/public/img/; Copy-Item -Recurse dist dist_electron/dist; Copy-Item -Recurse node_modules dist_electron/node_modules; electron-packager dist_electron My-earned-Wings --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=BUILDS --overwrite --asar --icon=dist_electron/public/img/Game_icon.ico" && node scripts/post-package-runtime-addons.cjs
